args: LOCAL="$HOME/.cursor/plugins/local/trelly/bin/trelly-mcp"; if [ -x "$LOCAL" ]; then exec "$LOCAL"; fi; CACHED="$(find "$HOME/.cursor/plugins/cache" -type f -path '*/bin/trelly-mcp' -perm -u+x -print -quit 2>/dev/null)"; if [ -n "$CACHED" ]; then exec "$CACHED"; fi; if command -v trelly-mcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec trelly-mcp; fi; echo 'trelly-mcp not found; run trelly install --cursor' >&2; exit 127
